title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Dynamic Filtering and Sorting

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Dynamic Filtering and Sorting

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,50)'>

<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<g transform='translate(0,-100)'>
<g transform='translate(100,0)'>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<rect x='-50' y='50' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' width='100' height='100'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(200,0)'>
<rect x='-50' y='50' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' width='100' height='100'/>
</g>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,200)'>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<rect x='-50' y='50' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' width='100' height='100'/>
<rect x='50' y='50' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' width='100' height='100'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,200)'>
<rect x='-50' y='50' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' width='100' height='100'/>
</g>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,250)'>
<g transform='translate(100,0)'>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='36' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='-50' y='150'>Metrics</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(200,0)'>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='36' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='-50' y='150'>Queries</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='36' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='-50' y='150'>Table</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(100,0)'>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='-50' y='220'>Chart 1</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(200,0)'>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='-50' y='220'>Chart 2</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='-50' y='220'>Filters</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<path d='M 50 250 L 150 250' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<path d='M 250 250 L 350 250' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
</g>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<circle cx='50' cy='100' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
<circle cx='250' cy='100' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
<g transform='translate(0,100)'>
<rect x='50' y='50' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' width='100' height='100'/>
<g transform='translate(150,0)'>
<rect x='50' y='50' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' width='100' height='100'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,150)'>
<rect x='150' y='50' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' width='100' height='100'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(-50,-50)'>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='36' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='50' y='50'>Table</text>
<text fill='#411C56' font-size='36' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' x='250' y='50'>Filters</text>
</g>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<rect x='-50' y='0' rx='10' fill='#C06C88' width='400' height='250'/>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<path d='M 50 0 L 150 0 150 50 100 50 100 100 50 100 50 150 0 150 Z' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,50)'>
<path d='M 250 0 L 350 0 350 50 300 50 300 100 250 100 250 150 0 150 Z' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<path d='M 50 50 L 50 150' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
</g>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<path d='M 250 50 L 250 150' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
</g>

```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use only specified colors and Tailwind CSS classes.
Must implement real-time analytics metrics with dynamic filtering and sorting.
Must include multiple charts, query playground, and rich analytical table with pagination.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Dynamic Filtering and Sorting

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify real-time analytics metrics, dynamic filtering and sorting, and interactive chart and table components.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, efficient state use, and adherence to Tailwind CSS classes.
